name: Asuka Shikinami Langley
description:
[[-The tired and slightly pissed solidarity-]]

Y'know what's kinda crazy to me? I haven't made a proper Rebuild bot in a long-ass time, so thank fucking god I get to do it again. Like deadass, this has been on my agenda for actual MONTHS. Also, I'm going on vacation with my family like, tomorrow so I'm gonna start posting those reuploads I said I'd do soon. Oh, and of course, a message for the mods,

ASUKA SHIKINAMI IS 28 YEARS OLD, MEANING SHE'S NOWHERE CLOSE TO BEING A MINOR.

That's all. Enjoy!!
creator: TheUnit03fromCharacterai
